_comment: REAL generic-capability reference for the 23-model CNA roster, ordered best -> worst. Backbone is the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (v4.0 composite: GDPval-AA, Terminal-Bench, GPQA Diamond, SciCode, etc.), snapshot July 2026. 22 of 23 models carry a sourced AA Intelligence Index number; only openai/gpt-oss-safeguard-20b is estimated (AA does not list the safeguard variant, but OpenAI states it performs 'on par with' gpt-oss-20b, which sits below gpt-oss-120b -- so it anchors the floor). Purpose: give the CNA-generalship-vs-benchmark-IQ rank correlation a defensible generic axis. The 'ranking' list is the only field the correlation reader consumes (scripts/run_leaderboard.py load_generic_ranking); 'scores' is human-facing provenance.
_source: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (v4.0), via artificialanalysis.ai + benchlm.ai/llm-stats.com aggregator snapshots, July 2026. Cross-checked against LMArena text/agent leaderboard commentary. See per-model note + confidence.
_scale: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (0-100, higher = more capable). Scores are the generic-capability axis; direction is what matters for the correlation, not exact points.
_confidence_summary: sourced = 22/23 (exact AA Intelligence Index number found). estimated = 1/23 (openai/gpt-oss-safeguard-20b:nitro, placed at the floor by OpenAI's 'on par with gpt-oss-20b' claim). Two ties handled by source score then family: gpt-5.4-mini (40.0) over qwen3-max-thinking (40.0); deepseek-v4-flash (40.3) over glm-5.1 (40.2).

anthropic/claude-fable-5.note: AA Intelligence Index #1 overall at launch (~5 pts ahead of any other lab's best). Anthropic's max-effort adaptive-reasoning flagship.

anthropic/claude-opus-4.8.note: AA Intelligence Index (Adaptive Reasoning, Max Effort). Prior #1 before Fable 5.

openai/gpt-5.5.note: AA Intelligence Index (xhigh). Top non-Anthropic frontier model this snapshot. Excluded from the live CNA run but placed here for the reference axis.

anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.note: AA Intelligence Index (thinking). New default for agentic coding at ~half Opus cost.

z-ai/glm-5.2.note: AA Intelligence Index. Leads open-weight SWE-bench Pro (62.1%); highest open-weight model on the composite.

google/gemini-3.5-flash.note: AA Intelligence Index. Newer-gen Flash outscores the older 3.1 Pro; the speed/value sweet spot.

google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview.note: AA Intelligence Index, ~rank 12. Previous-gen Pro-preview, now below 3.5 Flash.

qwen/qwen3.7-max.note: AA Intelligence Index. Highest-ranked Chinese model; 1M-token reasoning agent.

moonshotai/kimi-k2.7-code.note: AA Intelligence Index. Code-specialized; on the Agent Arena leaderboard. Scores slightly under general K2.6 on the composite.

deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash.note: AA Intelligence Index (Max), the cheap/fast DeepSeek tier.

z-ai/glm-5.1.note: AA Intelligence Index. Prior GLM generation, well below 5.2.

openai/gpt-5.4-mini.note: AA Intelligence Index. Small OpenAI tier.

qwen/qwen3-max-thinking.note: AA Intelligence Index (=40, +8 over the 32 Preview). Older qwen3 max with reasoning; well below qwen3.7-max.

qwen/qwen3.6-27b.note: AA Intelligence Index. Mid-size dense Qwen.

qwen/qwen3.5-35b-a3b:nitro.note: AA Intelligence Index. 35B-A3B MoE (3B active); small-active-param budget shows on the composite.

inception/mercury-2:nitro.note: AA Intelligence Index. Diffusion-LLM; fast but low on the reasoning composite.

google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite.note: AA Intelligence Index. Smallest/cheapest Gemini tier.

openai/gpt-oss-120b:nitro.note: AA Intelligence Index. Open-weight 120B; low on the reasoning composite despite size.

openai/gpt-oss-safeguard-20b:nitro.note: ESTIMATED. AA does not list the safeguard variant. OpenAI states gpt-oss-safeguard-20b performs 'on par with' gpt-oss-20b (a policy/safety-tuned 20B, smaller than the 120b at 23.8), so it anchors the floor. Value inferred, direction (weakest of the 23) is defensible.
